pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing runtime failures or incompatibility with modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 21 to utilize new language features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded Spring Boot 3.x stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler source and target to use the java.version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Explicitly setting compiler source/target ensures the build compiles against Java 21 standards, preventing compilation errors with newer syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JaCoCo version to a snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on Java 21 due to internal JVM changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate MySQL connector dependency to the new groupId and artifactId.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old mysql-connector-java artifact is deprecated and may not support Java 21 or Spring Boot 3.x properly; the new artifact is required for compatibility.
Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE namespaces; javax.validation is no longer available, requiring jakarta.validation-api for validation features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta XML Bind API dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and moved to Jakarta EE in Spring Boot 3.x; this dependency is required for XML binding functionality.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Ehcache dependency to use the Jakarta classifier.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ehcache requires the 'jakarta' classifier to provide classes compatible with the Jakarta EE namespace used by Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed from the Java SE module system and is not available in Jakarta EE 9+ compliant servers (like Spring Boot 3.x running on JDK 21), causing a ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

src/main/resources/application-mysql.pro.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource initialization property to the new naming convention introduced in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/resources/application-mysql.pro.why_exists: The property 'spring.datasource.initialization-mode' was removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using it results in the configuration being ignored, potentially causing schema initialization failures at runtime.

src/main/resources/application-postgres..general_idea: Migrate deprecated Spring Boot 2.x datasource initialization property to Spring Boot 3.x standard.
src/main/resources/application-postgres..why_exists: The property 'spring.datasource.initialization-mode' is removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using it results in a configuration error or ignored setting.

src/main/resources/application-postgres..general_idea: Migrate deprecated Spring Boot 2.x resource cache property to Spring Boot 3.x standard.
src/main/resources/application-postgres..why_exists: The property 'spring.resources.cache.cachecontrol.max-age' is removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using it results in a configuration error or ignored setting.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Migrate deprecated Spring Boot 2.x datasource initialization properties to Spring Boot 3.x sql.init properties.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: spring.datasource.schema and spring.datasource.data are removed in Spring Boot 3; using them results in ignored configuration or startup failure if strict binding is enabled.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Migrate deprecated Spring Boot 2.x resource cache properties to Spring Boot 3.x web.resources properties.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: spring.resources.cache.cachecontrol.max-age is removed in Spring Boot 3; using it results in ignored configuration.

src/test/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.
